diagrams.title: Knowledge Representation Trade-off Spectrum
diagrams.description: A spectrum showing representation languages arranged by expressiveness vs tractability trade-off
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the fundamental KR paradox and guide representation choices based on problem requirements

diagrams.title: Frame-Based Hierarchy Example
diagrams.description: A class hierarchy diagram showing inheritance in frame-based representation for a university domain
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrate how frames organize knowledge in hierarchies and how inheritance propagates properties from parent to child frames

diagrams.title: Semantic Network for Family Relationships
diagrams.description: A semantic network graph showing nodes connected by labeled relationships representing family relations
elements: Nodes: John, Mary, David, Sarah, Baby
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how semantic networks represent relationships between concepts using graph structures
